events.USER_REGISTERED: Sent immediately after a user creates an account.
events.CART_ABANDONED: Sent when a cart sits idle for 30 minutes (cron-driven, once per cart).
events.ORDER_CREATED: Sent the moment an order is placed (before payment).
events.PAYMENT_SUCCESS: Sent after a successful payment is recorded.
events.FIRST_PURCHASE_UPSELL: Sent right after a customer's first paid order â€” typically an upsell.
events.POST_PURCHASE_REMINDER: Sent ~7 days after any paid order â€” replenishment / review prompt.
events.INACTIVE_COMEBACK: Sent when a previously active customer goes 30+ days without ordering.
